PURE_WATER.description: At the start of each combat, add 1 [gold]Miracle[/gold] into your hand.
PURE_WATER.flavor: Filtered through fine sand and free of impurities.
PURE_WATER.title: Pure Water
DAMARU.description: At the start of your turn, gain 1 [gold]Mantra[/gold].
DAMARU.flavor: The sound of the small drum keeps your mind awake, revealing a path forward.
DAMARU.title: Damaru
DUALITY.description: Whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold], gain 1 temporary [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
DUALITY.flavor: "And the sun was extinguished forever, as if curtains fell before it." - Zoroth
DUALITY.title: Duality
TEARDROP_LOCKET.flavor: Its owner blind, its contents unseen.
TEARDROP_LOCKET.title: Teardrop Locket
GOLEN_EYE.flavor: See into the minds of those nearby, predicting their future moves.
GOLEN_EYE.title: Golden Eye
HOLY_WATER.description: Replaces [gold]Pure Water[/gold]. At the start of each combat, add 3 [gold]Miracles[/gold] into your hand.
HOLY_WATER.flavor: Collected from a time before the Spire.
HOLY_WATER.title: Holy Water
VIOLET_LOTUS.description: Whenever you exit [gold]Calm[/gold], gain an additional [gold]Energy[/gold]
VIOLET_LOTUS.flavor: The old texts describe that the surface of "mana pools" were littered with these flowers.
VIOLET_LOTUS.title: Violet Lotus
MELANGE.description: Whenever you shuffle your draw pile, [gold]Scry[/gold] 3.
MELANGE.flavor: Mysterious sands from an unknown origin. Smells of cinnamon.
MELANGE.title: Melange
CYLINDER_RELIC.title: Six-Shot Cylinder
CYLINDER_RELIC.description: At the start of each turn, add a temporary Reload to your hand. (Ethereal, Exhaust.) Block you gain is halved.
CYLINDER_RELIC.flavor: Hand-fitted chambers, ready for a wish.
HOT_EJECTOR_RELIC.title: Hot Ejector
HOT_EJECTOR_RELIC.description: The first time you fire a real bullet each turn, gain [gold]1 Energy[/gold].
HOT_EJECTOR_RELIC.flavor: Spent brass hits the floor; your tempo spikes.
